sections.paragraph: m., cattle, beasts, so called from their depasturing, (from the root בָּעַר No. 1; compare אָרָה No. 2). Used in the sing. collectively, like the Latin pecus, pecoris, of all kinds of cattle, Exo 22:4 Num 20:4, Num 20:8, 11 Num 20:11 Psa 78:48 specially of beasts of burden, Gen 45:17. (Syr. ܒܥܺܪ̈ܐܳ with Ribbui, the pl. mark; Arab. بَعِيُر id.)
